write command
            Sample:AssemblyXml2Doc write --path='.\' --file='*.xml' --output='..\myDocs\' --format='.md'
                            --path [optional] - This is path from xml documentation. Default is current directory
                            --output [optional] - This is destiny for created files. Default is equals --path
                            --file [optional] - This is file name pattern, the tool will read all documents with match value. Default *.xml
                            --format [optional] - this is the format output. Possible values is '.md'
